data.content:
This is an **xUnit v3** project on **Microsoft.Testing.Platform (MTP)**. Use the `--filter` option with `ClassName`:

```
dotnet test --filter "ClassName=Contoso.Cart.Tests.ShoppingCartTests"
```

Since xUnit v3 on MTP uses fully qualified class names, you need the full namespace. If you prefer a contains-style match:

```
dotnet test --filter "ClassName~ShoppingCartTests"
```

The `~` operator means "contains", so it matches without needing the full namespace.
